nasb.text: When Zimri saw that the city was taken, he went into the citadel of the king’s house and burned the king’s house over him with fire, and died,

esv.text: And when Zimri saw that the city was taken, he went into the citadel of the king’s house and burned the king’s house over him with fire and died,

cnv.text: 心利看見城被攻佔，就走進了王宮的城堡裡，放火焚燒王宮，自焚而死。

ccb.text: 心利见城被攻破，就走进王宫的城堡中放火烧宫，自焚而死。
